name: refactor-complete-messaging-dashboard-alignment
title: Complete Messaging Dashboard alignment with Jobs Dashboard
description: Complete the Messaging Dashboard alignment: add ECharts charts, enhance message detail dialog, redesign footer with system info, remove i18n, add missing stat cards, refresh controls, and 404 route

userStories.title: Remove i18n/localization — English only [S]
userStories.description: Sequential: remove vue-i18n plugin from main.ts -> remove i18n/ directory and assets/language/ files -> replace all $t() / t() calls with plain English strings -> uninstall vue-i18n from package.json -> verify build
acceptanceCriteria: No vue-i18n dependency in package.json
No i18n/ directory or assets/language/ files remain
All UI text rendered as plain English strings (no $t() or t() calls)
Frontend builds with zero errors

userStories.title: Redesign footer — system info + fixed height [S]
userStories.description: TDD order: write failing test -> implement minimal code -> verify PASS. Move system/meta info (messaging version, broker type, storage type from /api/meta) out of Dashboard.vue main content into a fixed-height footer visible on all pages. Footer should show meta info inline (e.g. 'Messaging: RabbitMQ | Storage: PostgreSQL | v1.2.3'). Make footer fixed height (~40px) and always visible at bottom of DashboardLayout.
acceptanceCriteria: System info (messaging type, broker, storage) displayed in the footer on all pages
Footer has a fixed height and is always visible at the bottom of the layout
System info section removed from Dashboard.vue main content area
Meta data fetched once and cached (not re-fetched on every page navigation)

userStories.title: Add 404 catch-all route [XS]
userStories.description: Sequential: add /:pathMatch(.*)*  catch-all route to router -> create simple NotFound view or redirect to Dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to an unknown path (e.g. /nonexistent) does not render a blank page
User is redirected to Dashboard or shown a 'Page not found' message

userStories.title: Create messagingStore (Pinia) for dashboard state [S]
userStories.description: TDD order: write failing test -> implement minimal code -> verify PASS. Create a Pinia store to manage dashboard metrics, stats, meta, and history data. Move all local reactive state from Dashboard.vue into this store. The store should manage polling lifecycle (start/stop), cache data across page navigations, and expose computed properties for chart-ready data.
acceptanceCriteria: messagingStore.ts created in stores/ with stats, meta, realtimeMetrics, and metricsHistory state
Polling lifecycle managed by the store (startPolling/stopPolling actions)
Dashboard.vue uses the store instead of local reactive state
Navigating away from Dashboard and back does not trigger a full re-fetch (cached data shown immediately, polling resumes)

userStories.title: Add ECharts dashboard charts (line + pie) [L]
userStories.description: TDD order: write failing test -> implement minimal code -> verify PASS. Add echarts + vue-echarts dependencies. Create chart components for the Dashboard page: (1) Real-time metrics line chart — 3 series: published/sec, subscribed/sec, subscriber latency over last 5 minutes from /api/metrics-realtime. (2) Hourly history line chart — 4 series: publish succeeded/failed, subscribe succeeded/failed over 24h from /api/metrics-history. (3) Success/failure pie chart — from /api/stats showing distribution of succeeded vs failed for published and received. Match Jobs Dashboard dark theme: transparent bg, #e0e0e0 text, dashed grid lines rgba(255,255,255,0.05), dark tooltips rgba(42,42,42,0.95). Use tree-shaking imports (CanvasRenderer, LineChart, PieChart, required components only). Charts auto-update via polling interval from messagingStore.
acceptanceCriteria: echarts and vue-echarts added to package.json with tree-shaking imports
Real-time metrics line chart renders 3 series from /api/metrics-realtime data
Hourly history line chart renders 4 series from /api/metrics-history data
Success/failure pie chart renders from /api/stats data
Charts use dark theme matching Jobs Dashboard palette
Raw JSON metrics dump and flat history table removed from Dashboard.vue
Charts auto-update when polling refreshes data in messagingStore
notes: Jobs Dashboard ECharts setup pattern in TimeJobCharts.vue lines 92-116

userStories.title: Enrich message detail backend endpoint [S]
userStories.description: TDD order: write failing test -> implement minimal code -> verify PASS. Modify GET /api/published/message/{id} and GET /api/received/message/{id} endpoints to return a DTO with message metadata alongside content. Currently returns message.Content (string). Should return: { id, name, content, added, expiresAt, retries, statusName, version }. This enables the frontend MessageDetailDialog to show metadata fields.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/published/message/{id} returns a DTO with id, name, content, added, expiresAt, retries, statusName, version
GET /api/received/message/{id} returns the same DTO shape (plus group field for received)
Existing frontend code that reads .content still works (field name preserved)

userStories.title: Enhance MessageDetailDialog with metadata + exceptions [M]
userStories.description: TDD order: write failing test -> implement minimal code -> verify PASS. Expand MessageDetailDialog to accept the full message DTO (from US-006). Display metadata fields (name, status, timestamps, retries, version) in a structured header section. Add structured exception rendering for failed messages — port the isException pattern from Jobs Dashboard ConfirmDialog (parse JSON exception into message, stack trace, source, help link, data sections with collapsible sections). Add copy-to-clipboard button for message content. Handle non-JSON content gracefully (display as plain text).
acceptanceCriteria: Dialog shows message metadata header: name, status chip, added date, expires at, retries count, version
Message content displayed with JSON formatting (or plain text for non-JSON)
Failed messages show structured exception rendering with collapsible stack trace, source, help link sections
Copy-to-clipboard button copies message content
Published.vue and Received.vue pass the full message DTO to the dialog
notes: Jobs ConfirmDialog exception rendering: lines 77-195 for parsing, 198-305 for template, 307-648 for styles

userStories.title: Add missing stat cards (Subscribers, PublishedDelayed) [S]
userStories.description: Sequential: map Subscribers and PublishedDelayed from /api/stats response -> add stat cards to Dashboard.vue -> verify rendering
acceptanceCriteria: Subscribers count stat card displayed on Dashboard page
PublishedDelayed count stat card displayed on Dashboard page
Values sourced from /api/stats response (already returned by backend but not surfaced)

userStories.title: Add refresh controls to Published/Received pages [S]
userStories.description: Sequential: add manual refresh button to Published.vue toolbar -> add same to Received.vue -> optionally add auto-refresh toggle (30s interval) -> verify consistency with Subscribers and Nodes page patterns
acceptanceCriteria: Published.vue has a manual refresh button that re-fetches the current message list
Received.vue has a manual refresh button that re-fetches the current message list
Refresh button placement and style consistent with Subscribers/Nodes pages

findings: Jobs Dashboard uses echarts + vue-echarts with tree-shaking imports (CanvasRenderer, LineChart, PieChart + components) — see TimeJobCharts.vue:92-116
Jobs Dashboard dark theme chart palette: transparent bg, #e0e0e0 text, rgba(42,42,42,0.95) tooltip bg, rgba(255,255,255,0.05) grid lines, DataZoom slider
Messaging /api/metrics-realtime returns CircularBuffer<int?>[4]: timestamps, published/s, subscribed/s, latency — 300 data points at 1s granularity
Messaging /api/metrics-history returns {DayHour[], PublishSuccessed[], PublishFailed[], SubscribeSuccessed[], SubscribeFailed[]} — hourly aggregates, 10min cached
Jobs ConfirmDialog has structured exception rendering: parses JSON exception into message, stack trace, source, help link, data, inner exception with collapsible sections (lines 77-305)
Messaging MessageDetailDialog only accepts messageContent:string and renders JSON.parse or raw — no metadata, no exception rendering
Messaging Dashboard.vue shows realtimeMetrics as JSON.stringify() in <pre> tag (line 114) and history as flat table (lines 133-160)
Messaging has vue-i18n installed with en/ar locales — only English needed
Backend /api/stats returns Subscribers and PublishedDelayed counts but frontend drops them
No 404 catch-all route in messaging router — unknown paths render blank
